options.name: -objects
options.description: List of db object(s) to dump, one or more of { analysis_view arc base_cell base_pin blockage cell_density clock congestion constraint_mode delay_corner design gcell_grid hinst hnet hpin hport inst layer marker net netlist opcond option p2p partition patch_wire pg_base_pin pg_pin pin pin_shape port rc_corner route_rule row site skew_group special_net timing_condition track_pattern unit_parasitic via_def }

options.name: -views
options.description: Dump data for the specified analysis view(s).
